title: Magic foam
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ewok_gliders_save_Soul_Trees.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Ewok gliders dropping magic foam to save the [[Soul Tree]]s]]
'''Magic foam''' was a creation of the [[Shaman/Legends|Shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] used to extinguish fires. 

The foam is delivered by being thrown or dropped on to a target in small bags; the bag burst upon impact, producing a large splash of material over a wide area that is usually sufficient to supress any flames in the target zone. 

The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] used this foam on their [[tree]]s when [[Morag]] the [[Tulgah/Legends|Tulgah]] [[Witch/Legends|witch]] attempted to burn them down with cursed [[Wistie/Legends|Wisties]]. In the process, cursed Wisties doused in the splash were changed back to normal in the process, which allowed the Ewoks to address the ignition source of the forest fire. Guided by the cured Wisties around the dangerous convection currents caused by the forest fight, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]] and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] flew [[Hang-glider/Legends|hang gliders]] above the trees to airdrop bags of foam, getting the fire under control and saving the [[Soul Tree]]s.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|The Cries of the Trees}} {{1st}}
